age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation degree in any social science discipline, Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing Marathi, Willingness to travel within Mumbai, Experience in conducting interviews in large-scale surveys, Prior experience in data entry using online or mobile-based tools
qualification.details: Graduation degree in any social science discipline. Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing Marathi. Willingness to travel within Mumbai. Experience in conducting interviews in large-scale surveys. Prior experience in data entry using online or mobile-based tools.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000 per Month, including TA/DA and local travel.

all_official_links.label: Download IIPS Research Investigator (Field) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIPS Research Investigator (Field) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Investigator (Field) positions at IIPS is scheduled for 22 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Investigator (Field) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree in any social science discipline. Proficiency in Marathi and willingness to travel within Mumbai are also essential requirements.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Investigator (Field) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month, which includes allowances for travel and local travel.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Investigator (Field) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Investigator (Field) position announced by the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Investigator (Field) posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Investigator (Field) position is a contractual job. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The specific address will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIPS offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.
